exclusion_result.name: Driving without a valid and effective driving licence
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The driver submitted a valid driving license, so this exclusion does not appear to apply.

exclusion_result.name: Mechanical or electrical breakdown
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The vehicle skidded, which could suggest a mechanical or electrical issue, but further investigation is needed.

exclusion_result.name: Consequential or indirect loss
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: Any indirect financial loss resulting from the accident may not be covered under this exclusion.

exclusion_result.name: War, invasion and nuclear risk
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: This exclusion does not appear to apply as the incident is a road accident.

exclusion_result.name: Driving under influence of alcohol, drugs or intoxicants
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no information indicating the driver was under the influence, but verification is needed.

exclusion_result.name: Normal wear and tear and gradual deterioration
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: Damage from normal wear and tear is not covered, but the incident appears to be due to an accident.

exclusion_result.name: Tyre and tube damage when vehicle body is undamaged
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The vehicle sustained damage, so this exclusion may not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Damage occurring outside the geographical coverage area (India)
exclusion_result.clause_ref: Policy Schedule — Geographical Area of Cover
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident occurred within India, so this exclusion does not apply.

exclusion_result.name: Vehicle driven by person not authorised by insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The driver is not mentioned as unauthorized, but verification is needed.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle beyond the limitations of use stated in the policy
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: The incident description does not indicate any commercial use of the vehicle.

exclusion_result.name: Use of vehicle for racing or speed testing
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no indication that the vehicle was used for racing or speed testing.

exclusion_result.name: Loss or damage intentionally caused by the insured
exclusion_result.reason_relevant: There is no evidence suggesting that the damage was intentional.
